note.zh-tw: 大陸地區執照核發，呼號 BG4LQP。
note.en: Mainland China station license issued. Callsign BG4LQP.

note.zh-tw: 完成洗禮和證實，按手領受聖靈的恩賜，正式成為教會成員。
note.en: Baptized and confirmed by the laying on of hands for the gift of the Holy Ghost.

note.zh-tw: 由 Scott D. Martin 按手按立為亞倫聖職的祭司。
note.en: Ordained a priest in the Aaronic Priesthood by Scott D. Martin by the laying on of hands.

note.zh-tw: 於 Rexburg 第七 YSA 支聯會大會作專題演講，並與總會七十員 Ozani Farias 長老交流。
note.en: Gave a talk at the Rexburg 7th YSA stake conference and met with Elder Ozani Farias of the Seventy.

note.zh-tw: 由 Dallin P. Georgeson 按手按立為麥基洗德聖職的長老。
note.en: Ordained an elder in the Melchizedek Priesthood by Dallin P. Georgeson by the laying on of hands.

title.zh-tw: 按立為聖殿和家譜顧問
title.en: Set apart as temple and family history consultant

note.zh-tw: 按手按立為聖殿和家譜顧問。
note.en: Set apart as a temple and family history consultant by the laying on of hands.

note.zh-tw: 由教長 Chris M. Allison 按手領受教長祝福。
note.en: Received a patriarchal blessing from Patriarch Chris M. Allison by the laying on of hands.

note.zh-tw: 於猶他州鹽湖城現場參加四月總會大會。
note.en: Attended April general conference in Salt Lake City, Utah, in person.

note.zh-tw: 為 Xinran Yu 執行確認聖事，按手賜予聖靈的恩賜。
note.en: Performed the ordinance of confirmation for Xinran Yu by the laying on of hands, conferring the gift of the Holy Ghost.

note.zh-tw: 雙語個人站首次部署至 Vercel。
note.en: Bilingual personal site first deployed to Vercel.
